chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.1234 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of M.A. No.16875/2024 ------------------------- 13.02.2026 Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, D.P.G. -------------------------------- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 12.12.2025. Continuous absence of applicant as well as his counsel reflects that they have lost interest to pursue this application, which is accordingly dismissed on account of non-prosecution, along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
